title: Increase coverage to 70% for src/config/ and src/generators/
description: Write comprehensive tests to achieve 70% line coverage for src/config/ and src/generators/ modules. Target files: ConfigLoader.ts, RoleConfig.ts, TierBasedGenerator.ts, and generator implementations.

stories.title: Increase ConfigLoader.ts coverage
stories.description: Add tests for ConfigLoader.ts edge cases including: migrationLegacyConfig, isValidProjectConfig, isValidUserConfig, and error paths
acceptanceCriteria: migrateLegacyConfig copies legacy config when new config doesn't exist
migrateLegacyConfig skips when legacy config doesn't exist
migrateLegacyConfig skips when new config already exists
isValidProjectConfig returns false for null/undefined
isValidUserConfig returns false for invalid providers object
isValidUserConfig returns false for non-string defaultProvider
loadProjectConfig handles file path (non-directory) correctly
getEffectiveConfig handles all provider mappings (inception, anthropic, etc.)

stories.title: Increase RoleConfig.ts coverage
stories.description: Add tests for RoleConfig.ts uncovered paths including: project config loading, capability overrides, fallback chains, and mergeConfigs
acceptanceCriteria: loadRoleConfig loads from project config file
loadRoleConfig applies capability overrides to CapabilityRegistry
loadRoleConfig handles UserConfig shape fallback (defaultProvider/providers)
resolveRole uses env var fallbacks correctly for all roles
mergeConfigs handles null base and overlay correctly
mergeConfigs merges fallbacks and capabilities correctly
detectProviderType returns 'openai' for bigmodel.cn URL
detectProviderType returns 'openai' for moonshot URL
projectToRoleConfig maps multiModel config correctly
getFallbacks returns fallbacks when defined
formatRoleConfig handles all provider types correctly

stories.title: Increase TierBasedGenerator.ts coverage
stories.description: Add tests for TierBasedGenerator.ts including: lazy config resolution, tier-based budget, generateLayer, generateFull, and error paths
acceptanceCriteria: resolveConfigIfNeeded called lazily on first generation
generateLayer returns Layer with correct metadata
generateFull returns complete LLMResponse with thinking
extractCodeFromThinking extracts code from markdown blocks
extractCodeFromThinking extracts code-like content from reasoning
getDefaultBudget returns correct budget for each tier
getRecentAdaptations returns last 3 adaptations
getUserPreferences returns frequently used domains
getTierInfo returns tier, budget, and domain
validateOutput base implementation returns valid=true

stories.title: Increase StrudelGenerator coverage
stories.description: Add tests for StrudelGenerator.ts wrapForGallery and additional sanitizeCode paths
acceptanceCriteria: wrapForGallery returns valid HTML with escaped content
wrapForGallery includes Strudel REPL embed
sanitizeCode handles empty input
sanitizeCode handles input with only whitespace

stories.title: Increase ToneGenerator coverage
stories.description: Add tests for ToneGenerator.ts wrapForGallery and additional paths
acceptanceCriteria: wrapForGallery returns valid HTML with escaped content
wrapForGallery includes Tone.js styling
sanitizeCode handles empty/null input

stories.title: Increase ASCIIArtGenerator coverage
stories.description: Add tests for ASCIIArtGenerator.ts edge cases
acceptanceCriteria: wrapForGallery returns valid HTML with escaped content
formatASCII handles empty lines correctly
formatASCII filters code block markers
formatASCII filters comment lines

stories.title: Final coverage verification
stories.description: Run full coverage report and verify all target files exceed 70% line coverage
acceptanceCriteria: All src/config/* files >70% line coverage
All src/generators/* files >70% line coverage
pnpm test passes with no new failures
